name: bequite-monorepo
description: BeQuite — root orchestrator. Brings up the Studio stack (api + dashboard + marketing) via Docker or native dev. Not published to npm.

scripts.dev:dashboard: cd studio/dashboard && cross-env BEQUITE_DASHBOARD_MODE=http npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix studio/api && npm install --prefix studio/dashboard && npm install --prefix studio/marketing && npm install --prefix tests/e2e
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:dashboard && npm run typecheck:marketing
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test:py && npm run test:e2e

author: Ahmed Shawky (xpShawky)
